meaning: 伊斯的利亚(半岛)(欧洲巴尔干半岛西北部)
examples: But in Istria you can feel the presence of a combined continental and Mediterranean cooking tradition.
In Istria and Kvarner, native instruments like sopila, curla and diple make a distinctive regional sound.
"This is an unfair process which will bring no benefits to either of the countries, " said Ivica Matosevic, a Croatian winemaker from the Istria peninsula shared by Croatia, Slovenia and Italy.
